debug_info.goal:
α✝ nt✝ : Type
G : ContextFreeGrammar α✝ nt✝
⊢ ∀ (dt : G.DerivationTree), dt.result.len = dt.collectLeaves'.length

failed_attempts:
intro dt
  induction dt with
  | leaf _ => simp [ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.collectLeaves']
  | node _ children ih =>
    simp [ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.collectLeaves']
    rw [List.length_bind]
    have : ∀ c ∈ children, Word.len c.result = List.length c.collectLeaves' := by
      intro c hc
      apply ih
      exact hc
    simp_all only [List.sum_map_eq_sum]
    rw [← List.sum_length]
    congr
    ext
    intro i hi
    rw [List.nthLe_map]
    apply this
    exact List.nthLe_mem _ _ hi

intro dt
  induction dt with
  | leaf _ => simp [ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.collectLeaves']
  | node _ children ih =>
    simp [ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.collectLeaves']
    rw [List.length_bind]
    have : ∀ c ∈ children, Word.len c.result = List.length c.collectLeaves' := by
      intro c hc
      apply ih
      exact hc
    simp_all only [this]
    rw [Word.len_mul]
    simp [List.sum_map_eq_sum]

  | node _ children ih =>

    have : ∀ c ∈ children, Word.len c.result = List.length c.collectLeaves' := fun c hc => ih c hc
